reviewer.evidencePolicy: Only mark runner-readiness branch shape satisfied; keep broader branch catalog completeness separate.

claimUpdates.whyThisLayer: The claim names machine-readable branch shape, which is deterministic runtime packet behavior.
claimUpdates.evidenceStatusReason: Verified by runner-readiness runtime tests: runner next branches expose stable identity fields, a blocking reason, setup ownership, writesFiles, runner id, and either requiredArtifact or requiredCommand.
claimUpdates.nextAction: Keep runner-readiness branch-shape tests current when changing agent-status or doctor next-branch payloads.
